items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
evidence: npm test: 43 passing tests on Linux x64 / Node v22.16.0
packed tarball clean-install: .bin/workframe --version returned 0.2.1 and status --json returned 0.2.1 linux/x64
verification cancellation: terminal AbortSignal reaches HTTP requests and asynchronous Codex/Claude children; interruption prevents Socratic prompts
authority isolation: inference children exclude Docker and SSH handles and receive only the selected credential; account paths receive no provider key
selection truth: hedged choices remain unresolved and account-backed versus key-backed paths disclose separate payer and credential sources
branch reconciliation: current main ledger commits merged into the implementation branch before resubmission
no live provider call, package publication, installation mutation, or non-CLI code change
acceptance: select one existing inference path conversationally without guessing ambiguity
require separate billing-disclosed consent before a minimal verification call
after a verified path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
package-local and packed-artifact checks pass without live credentials

review_history.summary: invalid provider serialization, weak consent semantics, inaccurate credential wording, incomplete authority tests, and nondeterministic interruption
secret-bearing diagnostics, token-substring verification, best/default question delegation, and red repository CI
in-flight verification was not cancellable, hedged choices were accepted, payer paths were conflated, inference inherited Docker/SSH authority, and branch/CI evidence was stale

review_focus: rerun all 43 package tests from the exact pull-request head
prove Ctrl+C terminates HTTP and CLI verification promptly and no Socratic prompt follows
prove hedged runtime answers remain unresolved
prove account and API-key paths disclose exact payer and only the selected credential crosses the boundary
prove inference children cannot inherit Docker or SSH authority handles
rerun packed-artifact, Windows-semantics, and repository CI checks from the exact reconciled head

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
